page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion Comic Anthology - TRAITOROUS ANGEL II
text:
is a manga anthology series based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion anime series. It is compiled into a single volume and it was published by Movic on 01 November 1996. http://rei.in.coocan.jp/evabooks/tritorous2.html 

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 489601264X
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4896012644
